description: Mathematical RL framework and neural architecture for closed-loop visual-acoustic articulatory speech imitation in multi-physics 3D simulation

userStories.title: Project Scaffold and Config System
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the repository initialized with full directory structure, pyproject.toml, Hydra config, and test infrastructure so that all subsequent development has a consistent foundation.
acceptanceCriteria: All directories created per PRD-C Section 7.5
pytest runs and passes placeholder test

userStories.title: MDP Dataclasses and Type System
userStories.description: As a researcher, I want the formal MDP specification implemented as Python dataclasses so that all modules have a mathematical contract to code against.
acceptanceCriteria: StateSpace dataclass with dim=39 (13 pos + 13 vel + 13 prev action)
RewardSpec with configurable weights w_a, w_v
13-DOF articulator spec with bounds and biomechanical labels

userStories.title: MuJoCo XML Oral Cavity Geometry
userStories.description: As a researcher, I want a MuJoCo XML model with jaw, tongue (3 segments), lips, teeth, and palate with 13-DOF tendon-driven actuation so that the RL agent has a physically grounded simulation environment.
acceptanceCriteria: MuJoCo loads the XML without error
1000 random-action steps without NaN or divergence
Geometry renders as visually reasonable mouth structure
userStories.notes: Step 3 of Execution Plan. Most complex single step - MuJoCo XML authoring.

userStories.title: Gymnasium Environment Wrapper
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the MuJoCo model wrapped as a standard Gymnasium environment so that standard RL libraries can train on it.
acceptanceCriteria: env.action_space is Box(13,) with correct bounds
env.reset() returns valid observation and info dict
env.step(action) returns (obs, reward, terminated, truncated, info)
Vectorized env with 16 parallel instances works

userStories.title: SPARC Audio Decoder Integration
userStories.description: As a researcher, I want SPARC integrated to convert articulatory state to audio waveform so that the RL agent receives acoustic feedback.
acceptanceCriteria: SPARC model loads or mock interface validates API contract
Adapter converts MuJoCo 13-DOF state to SPARC input format
Output is 16kHz waveform of correct duration
userStories.notes: Step 5. May need mock implementation if SPARC weights not available.

userStories.title: Visual Rendering and Vertex Extraction
userStories.description: As a researcher, I want MuJoCo offscreen rendering and lip vertex extraction so that visual feedback can be used for reward computation.
acceptanceCriteria: Lip vertices extractable from MuJoCo mesh data
userStories.notes: Step 6. Can run parallel with Step 5.

userStories.title: Perception Encoders (Sylber + wav2vec)
userStories.description: As a researcher, I want frozen pre-trained audio and visual encoders wrapped as perception modules so that observations and rewards can be computed from simulation output.
acceptanceCriteria: Sylber encoder: audio -> embedding of documented dimension
wav2vec encoder: audio -> frame features of documented dimension
userStories.notes: Step 7. Depends on Steps 5 and 6 for output formats.

userStories.title: Multi-Modal Reward Module
userStories.description: As a researcher, I want the reward function implemented with audio, visual, and auxiliary components with ablation toggles so that reward behavior can be analyzed.
acceptanceCriteria: R_audio: cosine similarity in Sylber space, range [-1, 1]
R_combined: weighted sum configurable via YAML
Ablation: can disable audio or visual independently

userStories.title: Policy Network (MLP Actor-Critic)
userStories.description: As a researcher, I want the actor-critic networks matching the architecture spec so that the RL agent has a well-defined policy.
acceptanceCriteria: Forward pass produces correct output shapes
userStories.notes: Step 9. Can run parallel with Steps 5-8.

userStories.title: PPO Training Loop
userStories.description: As a researcher, I want the PPO training loop connecting env, policy, reward, and logging so that RL training can be executed.
acceptanceCriteria: PPO runs for 10 episodes without error

userStories.title: Data Pipeline (VOCASET + Custom Speaker)
userStories.description: As a researcher, I want reference data loaders for VOCASET and custom recordings so that the RL agent has imitation targets.
acceptanceCriteria: VOCASET loader reads audio + FLAME params (or mock)
Custom speaker loader reads audio + video
Preprocessing segments into syllables and extracts embeddings

userStories.title: Evaluation Metrics
userStories.description: As a researcher, I want evaluation metrics (MCD, LVE, CER, Sylber similarity) implemented so that results can be quantified.
acceptanceCriteria: MCD computes between two audio signals
LVE computes between two vertex sets
CER via ASR model on generated audio
Sylber similarity between two audio signals
tests/test_metrics.py passes with known input/output pairs

userStories.title: Ablation Framework
userStories.description: As a researcher, I want an experiment runner for ablation studies so that design decisions can be empirically validated.
acceptanceCriteria: Audio-only reward config loads and trains
Visual-only reward config loads and trains

userStories.title: Visualization Tools
userStories.description: As a researcher, I want plotting tools for reward curves, articulator trajectories, and spectrograms so that results can be visualized for the paper.
acceptanceCriteria: Reward curve plot from TensorBoard logs
Articulator trajectory plot (13 DOF over time)

userStories.title: Integration Test - Full Pipeline
userStories.description: As a developer, I want an end-to-end integration test that runs the complete pipeline so that all modules work together correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: Full pipeline: load data -> create env -> train 100 eps -> evaluate -> visualize
Runs without error on consumer GPU
Reward curve shows some signal (not flat)

userStories.title: Training Runs - Babbling and Vowels
userStories.description: As a researcher, I want curriculum Phase 0 (babbling) and Phase 1 (vowels) executed so that the agent learns basic articulator dynamics and vowel production.
acceptanceCriteria: Babbling: agent produces some sound (average reward > -0.5)
Vowels: 5 cardinal vowels reach Sylber cos_sim > 0.5

userStories.title: Training Runs - Syllables
userStories.description: As a researcher, I want curriculum Phase 2 (syllable imitation) executed so that the agent learns consonant-vowel transitions.

userStories.title: Ablation Experiments
userStories.description: As a researcher, I want ablation studies executed so that the paper can justify the multi-modal reward and curriculum design.
acceptanceCriteria: 4 conditions trained: audio-only, visual-only, combined, no-curriculum

userStories.title: Paper - Methods and Architecture Sections
userStories.description: As a researcher, I want the core paper sections written so that the framework is fully documented.
acceptanceCriteria: Methods presents MDP, architecture, reward with full math notation
Methods Analysis justifies all 7 design decisions
userStories.notes: Step 19. Can start parallel with training runs.

userStories.title: Paper - Experiments, Results, Discussion
userStories.description: As a researcher, I want the experimental sections written so that the paper is complete.
acceptanceCriteria: Experiments section describes setup and baselines
Results section presents tables and figures
Discussion covers limitations and future work

userStories.title: Paper Figures and Tables
userStories.description: As a researcher, I want all paper-ready figures and tables generated so that the paper is visually complete.

userStories.title: Documentation and Release
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the repository documented and prepared for public release so that other researchers can reproduce the work.
acceptanceCriteria: All tests pass on clean install
